title: Prairie College  - Canada.ca
content:
You’re eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Arts in Intercultural Studies
- Bachelor of Arts in Ministry
- Bachelor of Theology
- Bachelor of Divinity in Sport Management and Leadership
- Bachelor of Divinity in Business Administration
- Bachelor of Ministry
You’re also eligible if you complete a flight training program at the Prairie Aviation Training Centre.
You’re not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
